message:
fix(cli,repair): add evidence preset validation and refine repair exchange

Evidence CLI:
- Reject --summary flag for metrics-preset evidence commands (only
  supported for ledger-backed presets) with clear error message
- Add test evidence_metrics_preset_rejects_summary_flag

Repair:
- Exchange and ownership module refinements
- Extent cache and resolve benchmark updates

Core:
- Internal validation logic adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
